items.title: Slavery exhibits must be restored at President's House Site, judge orders
items.description: The National Park Service and federal officials must restore the slavery exhibits to the President's House Site in Philadelphia, a judge orders.

items.title: Shooting reported at high school hockey game in Pawtucket, Rhode Island
items.description: The ATF said it would assist police responding to reports of a shooting during a high school boys' hockey game in Pawtucket, Rhode Island.
